description: Everyday foods from modern and contemporary settings.
foods: Two slices of bread around whatever's in the fridge, cut diagonally because that makes it taste better.
A wide round slab of melted cheese and sauce, eaten with hands and no regrets.
Thick and steaming with a wobbling cap of marshmallow, the official drink of cold evenings.
A scoop of something sweet and frozen, already melting faster than anyone can eat it.
Warm from the oven with the chocolate still soft, crumbling at the first bite.
Bright orange and gooey and exactly what everyone secretly wants for dinner.
Golden stacks drizzled with syrup, the breakfast that makes getting up worth it.
Buttered bread pressed flat and toasted until the cheese inside turns stretchy and golden.
